description: Perform a One-Sample Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test on the 'Exam' variable from the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv to determine if the median significantly differs from a test value of 50. The analysis must include the Hodges-Lehmann estimate (location parameter) with its confidence interval and descriptive statistics. Save the analysis file to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Exam_Wilcoxon_Test.jasp and create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/median_analysis_report.txt containing the Test Statistic (W), the p-value, and the Hodges-Lehmann estimate value.
